Best Film Award to our Cinema TV Master’s Degree Graduate Abdurrahman Öner

At the 6th Balkan Panorama Film Festival held in Izmir, the film “Aydede” directed by our Cinema TV graduate Abdurrahman Öner won the ‘Best Film Award’ in the national category. The film, shot in 2018, stars Ezgi Mola and Bilal Çelik.

The jury members of the festival, where a total of 20 films compete in 4 categories, international short and feature, national short and feature, include Derviş Zaim, Rıza Akın and Eyüp Boz.
